macro_context.market_sentiment: MATIC-USD is effectively delisted/unavailable on yfinance — Polygon has rebranded its token from MATIC to POL as part of its 2.0 architecture upgrade. The migration from MATIC to POL token completed in late 2024/early 2025. Current ticker on exchanges may be POL-USD or MATIC-USD depending on the exchange. No price data available for MATIC-USD on yfinance.
macro_context.total_market_cap: Total crypto ~$2.60T. POL (formerly MATIC) market cap estimated ~$1-2B at current depressed levels.
macro_context.fed_outlook: Higher rates hurt Polygon/POL's DeFi ecosystem
macro_context.institutional_flows: Polygon partnered with major TradFi (JPMorgan Onyx, Deutsche Bank) for institutional blockchain. RWA tokenization platform active.
macro_context.regulatory: POL/MATIC viewed as utility token. Polygon network hosting institutional RWA tokenization platforms.

ticker_news.headline: WARNING: MATIC-USD delisted on yfinance — token rebranded to POL in 2024/2025
Polygon 2.0 architecture with AggLayer unifying all ZK chains launches
JPMorgan's Onyx deploys on Polygon CDK for institutional settlements
Polygon zkEVM now one of largest Ethereum L2s by TVL
POL staking live — token holders can stake for network rewards
MATIC migration to POL completed — legacy MATIC still tradeable on some exchanges

on_chain_signals.whale_activity: No reliable price data for MATIC-USD on yfinance. Token migration to POL creates uncertainty in tracking.
on_chain_signals.funding_rates: MATIC perpetual futures still traded on some exchanges. Funding near neutral. Very low volume compared to peak.
on_chain_signals.exchange_flows: MATIC/POL migration ongoing. Some exchanges using MATIC ticker, others POL. Confusing situation for on-chain tracking.

development_activity: Polygon Labs extremely active: AggLayer (ZK chain aggregation), CDK for building new chains, zkEVM Type 1 prover, Miden ZK virtual machine. One of the most active blockchain development teams. Institutional use cases (JPMorgan, SWIFT experiments) continue.
upcoming_catalysts: AggLayer mainnet expansion. Institutional RWA tokenization growth. MATIC to POL migration completion cleanup. zkEVM performance improvements. NOTE: Investors should consider using POL-USD ticker instead of MATIC-USD for current price data.
